summary: Frontend-only testing for Om Patel minimalist portfolio. All 12 requested feature areas verified via Playwright on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). All data-testids resolve; navigation, mailto Request Resume buttons, mobile menu, scroll-to-top, and section rendering work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Header desktop Request Resume uses data-testid='resume-request-btn' while spec pattern is 'header-resume-btn'. Non-blocking, tests updated accordingly.
Mailto URL string is duplicated across Header (2x), Hero, Contact — consider extracting to a constant in mockData.js for DRY.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static portfolio (no backend). Verified: hero headline='Om Patel', summary, 3 mailto Request Resume buttons (header/hero/contact) with correct patelomr07@gmail.com href, all 5 nav sections scroll correctly, projects 0-2, experiences 0-1, skill-category 0-4, contact email/phone/linkedin/location, footer back-to-top scrolls to 0, mobile hamburger opens overlay with all nav items + mobile-resume-btn. No console errors.
